/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/src/expr_evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/src/simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/src/graph_dump.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/parser.cpp.o -o frontend
